events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: roofing work, pipe boot cracked. Rough-complete stage. Need to assess if within tolerance. A cracked pipe boot is defective - it will leak water. This is a fail. Risk is high/critical because roof penetration failure leads to water intrusion. Component condition: installed-defective, failed. Percent complete maybe 85 since rough-complete. Value - maybe crack size? Not specified numeric. I'll set value 0 or estimate. Findings: cracked pipe boot at roof penetration, compromised waterproofing. Actions: replace pipe boot, inspect surrounding flashing. References: IRC R905, mfr specs.
